top_signals.title: ECB eyes June rate hike as chief economist flags forecast upgrade
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund reappointed
top_signals.summary: Nigel Topping, Tania Songini and Marianne Økland have been reappointed as Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund (NWF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Altman-Backed Nuclear Firm Oklo Rises on US Reactor Fuel Program
top_signals.summary: Oklo Inc. shares jumped after the the Sam Altman-backed reactor technology company said it’s in talks to participate in a US Department of Energy program to supply nuclear fuel, an effort aimed at relieving potential bottlenecks that threaten to slow the deployment of fission power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
